_note: Cycle 4 micro-fix: arch-3 phase 2 LOCK_FILE EISDIR redirect reorder (line 129). AC_SRC: source-level pattern check. AC7c: LOCK_FILE-as-directory runtime harness. AC7 and AC7b (from task 20260524-171714) are inherited and must not regress.

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh after the arch-3 phase 2 patch is applied
acceptance_criteria.when: The file is read and syntax-checked
acceptance_criteria.then: The file contains the literal pattern `} 2>/dev/null 9> "$LOCK_FILE"` (redirect order: stderr first, fd-9 second) AND `bash -n hooks/userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh` exits 0

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh with the arch-3 phase 2 patch applied; a fixed session_id 'test-enospc-ac7c' injected via stdin (so LOCK_FILE derives to /tmp/claude-pressure-warn-test-enospc-ac7c.lock); that LOCK_FILE path is pre-created as a directory (EISDIR); a df shim on PATH emitting >75% for /tmp and /dev/shm to activate the pressure branch; cat shim emitting '0' or absent (fresh session, n=0); cleanup trap installed before setup
acceptance_criteria.when: The hook is invoked with that stdin and the shimmed PATH
acceptance_criteria.then: The hook exits 0 AND stdout is empty AND stderr is empty (the `9> $LOCK_FILE` failure is silenced by the leading `2>/dev/null`)

check.harness_recipe: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); shim_df="$tmpdir/df"; printf '#!/bin/bash\necho "Use%"; echo "76%"; echo "77%"\n' > "$shim_df"; chmod +x "$shim_df"; LOCK_FILE="/tmp/claude-pressure-warn-test-enospc-ac7c.lock"; mkdir -p "$LOCK_FILE"; trap 'rm -rf "$LOCK_FILE" "${LOCK_FILE%%.lock}" "$tmpdir"' EXIT INT TERM; stdin_json='{"session_id":"test-enospc-ac7c"}'; out=$(PATH="$tmpdir:$PATH" bash hooks/userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh <<< "$stdin_json" 2>/tmp/ac7c_stderr); exit_code=$?; stderr_out=$(cat /tmp/ac7c_stderr); rm -f /tmp/ac7c_stderr
